title: Radiation Damage Cascade Dynamics Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: N_Frenkel = epsilon_NRT * PKA_energy/(2*E_d); CD: dN_i/dt = G_i + k_nucl * N_1^i - k_dis * N_i; swelling = sum V_defect
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Radiation Damage Cascade Dynamics

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=150) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class SRIM/SPECTER for PKA; HEROD / OKMC for CD; multi-scale stiff ODE integrator provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
